title: 3-Player Whack Game Toy Mole with Lights & Sounds, 3Modes&7Speed Levels, LED Scoreboard, Interactive Hammer Toy, Educational Pounding Game for Kids Ages 3-10, Gifts for Boys & Girls
features: 【3-PLAYER ACTION – TRIPLE THE FUN!】 Now up to three players can play together! Oversized whack-a-mole game with 21+ light-up targets and 3 soft mallets—perfect for siblings, friends, and family fun.
【3 PLAY MODES & 7 DIFFICULTY LEVELS】 Includes Solo Practice, Team Battle, and Memory Challenge modes. Adjustable speeds grow with your child—from gentle beginner levels to fast expert rounds.

【BRIGHT LIGHTS, SOUNDS & VOICE ENCOURAGEMENT】 Flashing LED lights, cheerful voice prompts, and exciting sound effects keep kids engaged. Triple score displays ensure fair competition for all 3 players.
【LEARNING THROUGH PLAY】 Improves reflexes, focus, memory, and hand-eye coordination while encouraging number and colour recognition. Keeps kids active, happy, and away from screens.
【SAFE, STURDY & GREAT AS A GIFT】 Made from BPA-free, non-toxic materials with soft rubber mallets and no small parts. Built to last—an ideal present for birthdays, holidays, and rainy-day play!
